title: Lew's Battle Axes
body: New battle axes! You can easily produce these axes. Fighting with these axes is more fun. These Axes Will Make You Stronger. Its attack speed can be faster than a sword. Attack damage is already higher than ax and sword. **These battle axes are already available in Lew's Harderite mod. I think it would be better to make a separate mode for people who do not want to download Lew's Harderite.**
